name: Tarku Resources Ltd.
description: Tarku Resources Ltd. is a Canadian-based mineral exploration company focused on the discovery and development of high-quality precious and base metal projects. The company strategically operates in mineral-rich jurisdictions, including Quebec, Canada, and Arizona, USA. Tarku utilizes a project generator model to identify and advance exploration opportunities, targeting gold, silver, copper, and other strategic metals. By leveraging geological expertise and favorable mining environments, the company aims to create value for shareholders through the systematic exploration and development of its diverse portfolio of mineral assets.
